fields.name: Time Sheet No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the time sheet.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the line number that is assigned to an entry on a time sheet.

This field is used internally.

fields.name: Time Sheet Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date for a time sheet.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of time sheet line.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number for the project associated with the time sheet line.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number for the project task associated with the time sheet line.

fields.name: Cause of Absence Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a list of standard absence codes, from which you may select one.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the time sheet line.

fields.name: Work Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which work type the resource applies to. Prices are updated based on this entry.

fields.name: Approver ID
fields.tooltip:
Contains the ID of the person who approved the time sheet lines of this resource.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Service Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service order number that is associated with the time sheet line.

fields.name: Service Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service order number line that is associated with the time sheet line.

fields.name: Total Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total number of hours that have been entered on a time sheet.

fields.name: Chargeable
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the usage that you are posting is chargeable.

fields.name: Assembly Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the assembly order number that is associated with the time sheet line.

fields.name: Assembly Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the assembly order line number that is associated with the time sheet line.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies information about the status of a time sheet line.

fields.name: Approved By
fields.tooltip:
Contains the ID of the user who has approved the time sheet line. Usually, it is the same ID as specified in the Approver ID field, but it can also be the ID of the time sheet administrator.

Additional Information

The value in the Approved By field comes from the User Setup window.

fields.name: Approval Date
fields.tooltip: Contains the date of approval of a time sheet line.

fields.name: Posted
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the time sheet line has been archived.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a comment about this document has been entered.
